side_effects.description: Stinging pain that lasted for days. Pain resolved by adding extra BAC water and changing injection sites (lower back/gluteal area and inside thigh). Injection site pain occurs with this peptide.

protocol_notes: From 50mg vial, uses 10-20 units of BAC water mixed with dose. Injects in lower back area where glute meets it, or inside right thigh. Notes individual variation in tolerance and injection site selection.
